title: myosotis scorpioides subsp. palustris
intro: Myosotis scorpioides subsp. palustris, also known as marsh forget-me-not, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the borage family. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, as well as its ability to soothe digestive issues and reduce fever. The plant's health benefits include its use in treating respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and coughs, as well as its ability to support liver function and boost the immune system. Herbal preparations of marsh forget-me-not can be made into teas, infusions, and tinctures, and are typically taken to support overall health and well-being.
